subject: feat(pwa): auto-extract meta theme-color hex from DaisyUI themes
body:
Replace hand-picked hex approximations with a build script that reads
DaisyUI's oklch theme definitions and converts them to hex automatically.
Also moves aqua to dark themes to conform with DaisyUI's color-scheme.

Run `npm run generate:meta-colors` after DaisyUI updates.

Tags: pwa, theme, build, automation
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-theme-color
Semver: minor

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JrL2asTpesrUXcPYxuGUKw
title: auto-extract meta theme-color hex from DaisyUI themes
